title: bridelia ovata
intro: Bridelia ovata, also known as the Eclipta or Bridelia, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bridelia ovata include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Bridelia ovata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional remedies like decoctions and poultices.
